title: EEG: First Episode Psychosis vs. Control Resting Task 2
description: This dataset comprises resting-state EEG recordings from two independently collected samples of healthy controls and first-episode psychosis (FEP) individuals. EEG data were acquired using a 60-channel low-impedance 10-10 system cap during 5-minute resting periods. The second sample excludes subjects overlapping with the first acquisition to avoid redundancy. Clinical assessments including psychiatric rating scales, cognitive batteries, and socioeconomic measures are provided in the phenotype directory.
methods_description: Resting EEG data were recorded for 5 minutes using a 60-channel low-impedance 10-10 system electrode cap with an Elekta Neuromag system. Clinical assessments included BPRS, SANS, SAPS, GAF/GAS, SFS, MATRICS, WASI, Hollingshead Index, and medication chlorpromazine equivalency.
